title: Norwegian Flatbread
description: A traditional Norwegian flatbread recipe made with simple ingredients. Perfect for snacking or serving with your favorite meals.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and salt.
Gradually add water and mix until dough forms.
Knead dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Roll out each part into a thin circle.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Cook flatbread for 1-2 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve warm, wrapped in Norwegian flatbread if desired.
